summary: Iteration 26: 4 new features tested - Stock Alerts API, EOD Summary Report, Partner P&L Report, WhatsApp Report Integration with new report types. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 features verified working correctly.

issues: When no partners exist, shows 'No partners found. Add partners in the Partners page to see P&L' - working as expected

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts returns 200 with empty list (no items below min stock)
Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts returns proper list structure with item_id, item_name, unit, current_balance, min_level, deficit
Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts?branch_id=<id> filter works
Backend: GET /api/reports/eod-summary?date=2026-02-27 returns 200 with full structure
Backend: EOD summary has sales section (total, cash, bank, online, credit_given, credit_received, transaction_count)
Backend: EOD summary has expenses section (total, cash, bank, by_category, count)
Backend: EOD summary has supplier_payments section (total, cash, bank, count)
Backend: EOD summary has summary section (net_profit, cash_in_hand, bank_total)
Backend: EOD summary net_profit calculation verified (sales - expenses - supplier_payments)
Backend: GET /api/reports/eod-summary?date=&branch_id=<id> branch filter works
Backend: GET /api/reports/partner-pnl returns 200 with company_summary and partners list
Backend: Partner P&L company_summary has total_revenue, total_expenses, total_supplier_payments, net_profit, total_partner_shares
Backend: Partner P&L partners array has partner_id, name, share_percentage, total_invested, total_withdrawn, current_balance, profit_share_entitled, roi_pct, monthly
Backend: POST /api/whatsapp/send-to requires phone number (400 on missing)
Backend: POST /api/whatsapp/send-to accepts eod_summary report type (returns 400 'WhatsApp not configured' - expected without Twilio)
Backend: POST /api/whatsapp/send-to accepts partner_pnl report type (returns 400 'WhatsApp not configured' - expected without Twilio)
Backend: POST /api/whatsapp/send-to rejects unknown report types with proper error
Frontend: Dashboard loads with WhatsApp button in header
Frontend: WhatsApp Send Dialog opens with Phone Number input, Report Type dropdown
Frontend: WhatsApp dialog shows 'End-of-Day Summary' option in Report Type dropdown
Frontend: WhatsApp dialog shows 'Partner P&L' option in Report Type dropdown
Frontend: WhatsApp dialog has Send button for sending reports
Frontend: Reports page loads with 'EOD Summary' tab visible
Frontend: EOD Summary tab has date picker and branch filter
Frontend: EOD Summary 'Generate' button loads report with title 'EOD Report — 2026-02-27'
Frontend: EOD Summary shows KPI cards (Total Sales, Total Expenses, Supplier Payments, Net Profit)
Frontend: EOD Summary shows Sales Breakdown (Cash, Bank, Online, Credit Given, Credit Received)
Frontend: EOD Summary shows Cash Flow Summary section
Frontend: EOD Summary has 'Print Report' button
Frontend: Reports page has 'Partner P&L' tab visible
Frontend: Partner P&L tab loads with company summary (Total Revenue, Total Expenses, Supplier Payments, Company Net Profit)
Frontend: Partner P&L has Refresh button
Frontend: Settings page has WhatsApp tab for configuration
critical_code_review_comments: Stock Alerts: /api/stock/alerts queries items with min_stock_level > 0, calculates balance from stock_entries - stock_usage, returns items where balance <= min_level sorted by deficit
EOD Summary: /api/reports/eod-summary aggregates sales, expenses, supplier_payments for a specific date with branch filter. Shows payment mode breakdown and expense categories
Partner P&L: /api/reports/partner-pnl calculates company net profit and distributes to partners based on share_percentage. Shows monthly investment/withdrawal breakdown
WhatsApp Integration: POST /api/whatsapp/send-to now supports 'eod_summary' and 'partner_pnl' report types. Messages are formatted with markdown-like syntax for WhatsApp
WhatsApp requires Twilio credentials (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN) which are not configured - sending will fail but message generation works
Stock alerts banner in DashboardLayout polls /api/stock/alerts every 60 seconds, shows banner only when items are below minimum stock
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Stock alerts empty due to no items with min_stock_level set. Partner P&L shows company totals but no partners configured.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 complete. New features tested: 1) Stock Alerts - GET /api/stock/alerts returns items below min_stock_level, Frontend shows banner at top of dashboard when items are low stock. 2) EOD Summary - GET /api/reports/eod-summary?date=YYYY-MM-DD, Frontend has 'EOD Summary' tab in Reports page with date picker, branch filter, Generate button, shows full daily report. 3) Partner P&L - GET /api/reports/partner-pnl returns company summary and per-partner breakdown, Frontend has 'Partner P&L' tab in Reports page. 4) WhatsApp Integration - POST /api/whatsapp/send-to now accepts 'eod_summary' and 'partner_pnl' report_type, dialog dropdown shows all 6 report types. WhatsApp requires Twilio config which is not set (MOCKED send, but message formatting works).
mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp sending requires Twilio credentials (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER) which are empty in backend/.env. The /api/whatsapp/send-to endpoint returns 400 'WhatsApp not configured' when attempting to send. Message generation and formatting logic is verified to work.
